content: you might have trouble surviving
a lot of poison application not much survivability
What alert are you aiming for

Based on your current unit pool. 

W1 a3 - caecus, ogier, doll, sanga.

W2 a4 - gmurphy lemurian team

W3a3/4 - thais dore aigis pickman

W4a4 - helot lotan ramona whale support Mouchette.  Hrlot and lotan on burial grounds, full DR set. Ramona on skey. Save lotan OE for boss.

W5a3/4 - castor pollux
If youre aiming for a5, w4a5 is possible if you learn to play Mouchette well
Idk my highest Dtide is 315 so I’m trying a get a bit higher to at least 330 in order to get the purple fragments things as I don’t really have any other way to get them
Everything at w3 min should get you 350 iirc
You can try these teams at alert 3. Drop me a ping if youre unsure what you wanna do
After A3, you can attempt to push for a4
Im not 100% sure on how w5 works with castor pollux. But it's a popular comp this tide

https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/s/kuc5HDaK8D

content: What would be a good replacement for Ramona? Seems I'm not getting much value out of her
you can put aigis
Do you know how to play the Caro team? I’m not sure how to deal enough damage

On your burst turn.

Thais exalt dupe chroma (pickman) 

Pickman uses 2 cost to discover a relic. Uses exalt to discover smth.

Pickman duped chroma is now 0 cost. Each chroma gives temp str. 

Dore burst
I'm thinking of making a poison team, I don't have much though. I have Xu at E1 but aside from that I'm a tad limited. Any thoughts? Anything I ought to watch out for or pull towards?

A friend told me I could try to fit Clem in as a support if I go down Ultra, maybe with Liz, which doesn't sound bad to me because I am quite fond of Clementine, but I don't know anything but Mouchette atm.
e0 liz will be rough to play, you probably use agrippa as your main poison applier and run xu agrippa thais clem
clem is very solid flex slot although shes arguably not the best fit here
you can put her in and it will be fine
other options for last slot are aigis, faint, leigh, karen, nymphaea, doll
Enlightening Liz shouldn't be too hard, standard and all
She's only E0 because I've been dumping everything into the Caro standards b/c Faint & kinda but not really Helot for Mouchette.
probably not the most cost efficient thing to do
but
i think liz becomes comfy to play at e3
Yeah that probably won't take too long
well maybe a bit
but not that long
dont rush to build liz anyway
shes ok but not that good
I just need a second team to build towards tbh
agrippa is fine for now
my primary team's doing well but I know I'll need more for dtide
you should just pull other realms in general and broaden your account
like u have 0 blue characters
thats one free alert 1 team
how so
Mind you I haven't actually done dtide much
as in its 5 extra standard characters u could own
fair enough
sorel works well in blue
thats an a3 capable team

I suppose the question then becomes,
> What would be good with Xu to keep on my radar?
> What would be good with Clem (I'm biased and I like her) to keep on my radar?
while I keep playing
clem is a str stacker who works well with a lot of teams
my clem is spoiled for teams
i have to put her in the team that needs the most help
So kinda just goes with whatever then.
for your purposes shes effectively a wildcard that will just make any team better
Maybe less so at e0 but still good
works best with characters that need str like sorel or liz
Xu also similarly generalist, i think you have most of what she wants already
You lack faros who is a solid poison applier
and aforementioned e3 liz

But if I did, in the future, get Liz up, could I throw her in something with Clem, Xu, and someone else? You mentioned xu, agrippa, thais, clem though I'll admit Mouchette and Thais are currently frolicking in the metaphorical grass atm
Trying to reduce my dependency on stuff I'm already using in that team so I don't have to start sharing too much
at least Aigis and Faint are interchangable there
Xu works without thais
you can run liz xu agrippa clem
Seems achievable in the future, yeah.
Anything else of note I have that I ought to not sleep on?
thats all currently
alr, thanks for the help!

rewards

I found that game like a hour ago and this is perfect. But I'm completely doesn't understand what to pull, only guide I found is "roll starting awakening to Caecus and replace Ogier with Caecus and draw for his signature". I dropped some pulls to yellow banner(didn't notice that have selector too) and I think I draw a limited support and Pandia, she looks like scaling from counter too. Can I use them as viable trio and who I need for 4th  place? Game gives me some kind of bottle with 1 awakener of choice. 
Or I must pull someone limited? I see 3 ending banners, so I don't know who's to pull or select.
for limited banner that is up right now
Pull dore LOL

you can consider 

1 copy of Xu : really good caro realm support, work as a generic support at E0 and extremely good in poison team with more investment

1 copy of doresain: decent DPS for most part of story content, will allow you to get pass early game very nicely, but he kinda falls off at the super late game content, but that will be quite long later, so its still worth to have him if you want to have a easier early game
do not fall for the caecus propaganda, he is trash
he's a healer and vulnerable applier nothing more
caecus is ok early on
you can use literally anything early on and it clears
in the hard bosses where your team comp actually matters
caecus does nothing
can use anything sure, but might as well use the likes of caecus and brown
they all do nothing later on anyway
point being
dont specifically invest in him and expect him to stay relevant
ogier is much stronger late game
lotan ramona doll are all better long term investment than caecus
eh i'd rather run caec then invest in dore for e.g
any of these characters is better than caecus
anyhow xast, cheri is right and investing in ramona doll and ogier is better
they may not be as good early on but better late
look at this do nothing sanga <:Doll_Wait:1468259092459032606>
caecus would not be dealing that dps let me tell you
Doresain is good for clearing story you can consider him
he only stops being good when enemies have like 1 million hp
which is very very late game
you can clear all of normal mode story with doresain
up to arc 2 chapter 4

Oh, ok, it's hard. Thank God I found a training to take a look on standart characters. 
But can someone explain me Hameln? It's not worth right now? It seems powerful exalt, but his rouse make cards cost too much. Like it needs stock insights, or another mana source. As I can see I need also Karen cuz she have mana. Is it good idea to pull Doresain and yellow standart till Karen, and mix them? Like Aigis, Doresain, Hameln, Karen? Or there must be another dps to pair with? 
Also do Dore need his wheel too? Pulls are pretty limited for now xd
dont stress about it and just do the story with whatever you have rn
try out different teams learn the characters
Hameln is not that good at e0 but he can make cards cheaper when roused
thats his main use
for example you can use descending scale to make his memory rondo cost 1
then it gives you 2 insights so you are +1 arith +2 cards
We have energy and if I lvl every character I'll run out of resources very fast.
You haven't unlocked event yet
there's a currently running event where u can spend menophin for rewards
it lets you borrow other users characters
so you can bring a lv90 carry and brute force the hardest difficulty and get the same rewards as endgame player
Then you drown in resources for early game
i know exactly how much energy new players have, i have a 5 day old speedrun account lol
Xu thematic 120 energy cost? Unlocked. I rly can go hardest with 3 lvl 20 with 1 support?
If the support is mouchette, yes
you probably have to use emergency gnosis but its worth it to unlock
after you do it once, you can re-enact and clear instantly
I did this last event

here's the UID i used: 100759759

u can set them as favorite and they dont need to follow back

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1458885057270906995
I did this on my speedrun account as well
Did the hardest difficulty with 3 level 10 units
just use gnosis
its worth it
HOW much dmg?! O my...
Or I must try Madness difficulty?
You can do madness if you want but its probably not worth it right now
the event is lasting for another few days
you can go do more story and level up your characters
I also found banner characters trial and seems like Miryam is a support but I liked her design and abilityes. And want  full blue pack? Can I do viable pack with her and standart blues?
as mentioned, anything viable early on. she good later on with gmurphy
"viable" for what
You can prob clear story with it
Endgame dtide will be a challenge unless your team also has gmurphy
For clearing story. Endgame needs many characters I think.
u will struggle if u only use aequor characters
aequor scales badly into late game
u can probably clear until like chapter 7 and then it will be suffering for the rest of the way
unless you really try hard to make it work
Blessed pull xd does she needs dupes/signature?
E2 miryam goated
e2 is not bad but she works at e0
e2 is more qol than anything, not worth specifically pulling for
wanted to try a counter comp anything i should change?
this is bluewil
its a standard tawil dps comp lol
although tawil probably not as strong here since yours is only e1
She will do 90% of the damage
Tentacles will do 9%
caecus will do 1%
you probably want to put life drain on hameln
and build tawil with dps build
ok2 are the covs on murphy and caecus alright?
seems fine
tawil probably should have blade of the titan
caecus is mostly there for vulnerable tbh
although you can do cute strats by chaining tawil 4wings to stack temporary str and then playing caecus shattered halberd
its the best way to make him actually do any counter
what is the best team i can make with these characters, i'll level them up and everything i just have no idea who.
the "best" team is probably tawil gmurphy +flex
for example tawil gmurphy murphy caecus
id recomment murphy tinct tulu winkle if you like aequor
i also have that horizon thing that can give you a copy would i use it on gmurphy?
wait so tawil generates the bulk of counter in the bluwil comp?
she generates a lot of str which then is converted to counter, yes
i would use it on thais
and then use next months on thais again
ah ok tyyy
oh cool, any stage i could test this counter comp?
anywhere tbh
it takes some practice to play though
notoriously fiddly comp that plays 15 cards per turn
tawil wings go brrr
its basically a non deterministic combo deck
time consuming
murphys exalt nerfs any damage you take the next turn by half and winkle lets you exalt more than once with a unit per turn
yeah i wanted to try this comp since it seems interesting
i would not recommend tulu dps for endgame
yeah hes more of a support for tentacle dmg lategame
what skills should i prioritize leveling on tawil? kind of low on mats
pinions is most impactful
exalt also levels the cards you discover
the fate of any early game dps....
the rest of her cards are mainly for aliemus
which is like fine but lower priority
twin wings makes a lot of aliemus already
not SANGA
okay sanga speedrunner
ngl leigh is lowkey nice
trying her for the first time
leigh underrated healer
dps leigh wen
make leigh great again
this good for now? I dont got caecus & hameln sig wod
its fine
Caecus sig is not bad cause it increases his passive heals by a lot
id prefer that over wanda wheel on him
~~makes him good for something~~
hameln sig is more of a dps wheel, not important for hameln
maybe ill use a book to get caecus wod after i practice the comp a bit
caecus is the most replaceable character here btw
so i wouldnt worry about it TOO much
If you put caecus with like wanda daffodil, characters that can actually generate a lot of counter, then he might contribute with his 3 cost
or if you get counter relics in dtide
he is not bad as a counter support just generates very little himself without help
damn i wanted to go for a wanda comp but heard she needs a lot of investment
wanda is prob the best counter character if you actually intend to play a grindy counter comp
theres not a lot of bosses its good against so shes niche
OE daffodil can make a huge amount of temp counter so is better for cheesing bosses in general
daffodil does the funny speed clears
wanda takes like 15 turns
yea i am not OEing characters any time soon 😅
yea i wont invest much in counter comps yet just wanted to test bluwil out since i already got the characters by chance
Bluwil is sort of a hybrid comp where you usually kill with wing spam but you can also stack counter if its good in that specific fight
damn how would i go about it if I stack counter? is there any vids on this counter bluwil playstyle
flares is #1 bluwil propagandist
he probably has videos on it
i havent looked though, dont like his persona
but basically you just play 4 wings a lot and then get either caecus 2 cost or the copied one from tawil
you can use insights or hameln descending scale to get arithmetica to play it
if you crit with it then its like thousands of counter from 1 card
alright ill take this in mind and check flares' vids on tawil aswell. thanks for the help!
but last question though, if i would use my protos to e3 someone, would using  it for a e0 castor or e0 ghelot be better now?
ghelot probably
e0 castor is usable e0 ghelot is very hard to make work
wait really? ive been lurking on the discord and seen some that dont like ghelot rn
these are old players who have all the characters
talking about how ghelot is no longer in the top 5 best teams to beat alert 5 dtide with so they stopped using her
shes still very strong lol
her issue is shes greedy for supports
without thais aigis shes much weaker
which is a big problem because you cant repeat characters in dtide
yeah i was hesitating because of this and i kinda have what castor needs for a decent comp rn
id say proto whoever you enjoy playing
ghelot is still good dont worry
castor is also good
ngl my plan was to pull for ghelot on the next rerun since she was most likely to be on the banner and proto castor but biav had other plans 😅
now you get to pull for horla and pickman <:pray:1356053116260454534>
much better reruns lol
and HORLA WHEEL
one of the most insane wheels
e3 horla wheel is my plan for this patch
well i already got e1 horla and her wheel 😅  getting a copy of pickmans good tho right?
hes pretty good
i got doresain for the hell of it so i could use a doresain pickman comp for like at most a3 right?
can prob do a4
doresain actually very good as long as enemies have less than 10k hp
and pickman is a big buff to him
thats great since i fw their design regardless of doresain being a bit bad, thanks alot again for the help!<:bow:1356053037159944473>
You can even use Dore in a5 for some stages but its pretty situational
tinct carrying my ass through a5 rn
her mirror image is so good
infinite strength steal 🦅 🦅 🦅
all it took was to finally ban elite for people to stop shitting on doresain lmao 😭 😭 😭
watch mouchette deal 1 damage five times
oe ogier with goliath tulu and corpo y'all watch me trying to beat a2 with it
stalling is the way trust
(i just wanted to stick him in a team to try him out bc I've never actually used him)
okay so spam discard corpo stacks and ten tentacles but make sure none of them are white I can't see the str gain on them if they are
anyone got a team for daffodil or uvhash?
though to me daffodil feels soo much stronger than uvhash
this is the uvhash I run
Moreso not having enough Enlightenments, Uvhash generally wants to have his OE yet still cannot compete in Damage Output with DPS Characters who released after hum

Daffodil has plenty of options, but her best Teams generally lies with Clementine & Horla but you can probably still get away with running Characters who have some kind of Vulnerable and/or Weakness Application, some way to generate Aliemus, supports Draws and have a way to raise Hand Limit

Caro: Thais, Aigis, Salvador, Pickman, Xu

Aequor: Murphy, GMurphy, Myriam, Faros

Ultra: Castor, Cassiah, Erica, Winkle, Tinct

Chaos: Hameln, Ryker, Ramona, GRamona, Tawil
ty
Wc man

Hello, popping in to check before investing. I'm still quite early, only chapter 3, and here's my collection. I've looked through some guides and such, which have been very helpful.

Currently running mono-aequor, and so far it's feeling great, a bit overtuned if anything because I'm two turning most fights, but I assume that's just because I'm at chapter 3 and will stop pretty soon.

However, I wanted to check out the idea of grabbing Agrippa with my other protoparadise, and running a poison-based team with Xu, Agrippa, Miryam, and Faros. Faros is at E2, everyone else would be at E0.

I guess, while it sounds fun, my main worry would probably be surviving until the poison takes effect after the enemy does their attack, and I'm not seeing that much defense in the team. Basically, would I be fine to play to late story with that kind of team, or, is it going to hit a hard wall after a few chapters, and I should go spend my protoparadise on something else?

Also, for bonus points, are there any fun teams I'm overlooking that I can make with the awakeners I currently have?

content:
Who should I level for my Xu? This is what I have rn and also Lily not in the pic
(Also lmk if there’s anyone that would be worth to pull for her, except I don’t like agrippa so not her)
aigis nymphaea ramona could work
aigis is very good

ah okay, i'll level her up
technically i need ramona to cosplay hameln for my tawil team but that should be solved once he reruns
ty!
I just found strange thing when lvling characters, what is Ramona Timeworn and wot thing I need to unlock this with 60 pulls and does it worth to do? She still be like recharge posse and draw cards?

Pick between Faros & Agrippa for Poison Applicator. With the former being the more consistent pick imo. Your 4th Slot can be somebody to help with applying Weakness / Strength Down, generate Arithmatecia / Aliemus , stack Death Resistance etc. Standouts for those would be Thais, Salvador, Murphy, etc
You gotta complete Ramona: Timeworn 's Events. Don't remember which one but I think it's the Psyche Deepdive
I appreciate it. Though, question, how often do characters get rerun? Like, am I looking at, next banner in 4 days for one of those, or like, 4 months from now?
faros and agrippa are standard characters, they don't get banners
limited characters get rerun every 6 months on average
Yeah, np
Characters typically rerun 6 - 9 after their latest Banner ends
Is there a good place to check banner history to see which of those options would be coming up next?
Yeah, this is the one I use
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1gRDzdVHGfCC4qjt5aZYKuU9FWEfWdqREztNGeiczmRk/htmlview?usp=embed_facebook#gid=1346339910

embeds.title: Morimens Banner History and other stuff

content: Yh 6 (- 9) months
Appreciated, thanks again. Looks like, probably about 2-3 months for a Salvador rerun is my best bet on a 4th slot from those listed options, or just the new banner character being relevant.
Nah, the ones I listed were alternatives. Horla, who you'll want to have ideally will be in the upcoming Triple Rerun Banner
It's also possible to have her on many other Comps too
I highly recommend picking her up
Np btw man
